title: Free Pizza & Resume Review
description: Drop in for free pizza while SCP members review your resume and give feedback.

title: Intro to Machine Learning Workshop
description: Beginner-friendly workshop covering supervised learning fundamentals with Python.

title: Yoga on the Lawn
description: Start your morning with a guided yoga session on the lawn. All levels welcome.

title: Hackathon Prep Night
description: Form teams and brainstorm project ideas for the upcoming HackaBull hackathon.

title: Bulls Basketball Watch Party
description: Watch the Bulls play on the big screen with free wings and drinks.

title: Mindfulness Meditation Session
description: A 30-minute guided meditation to help manage stress during midterms.

title: Career Fair: Engineering & Tech
description: Meet recruiters from top tech companies. Bring your resume and dress professionally.

title: D&D One-Shot Night
description: Join us for a beginner-friendly one-shot adventure. No experience needed, characters provided.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Hands-on workshop using pandas and matplotlib for data analysis.

title: Intramural Soccer Signups
description: Last day to sign up for spring intramural soccer leagues.

title: Study Abroad Info Session
description: Learn about summer and fall study abroad programs and scholarship opportunities.

title: Open Mic Night
description: Sign up to perform or just come enjoy live music, poetry, and comedy.

title: GRE Prep Workshop
description: Strategies and practice for the GRE quantitative and verbal sections.

title: Free Smoothie Monday
description: Grab a free smoothie to start your week right. First 100 students only.

title: Cybersecurity CTF Competition
description: Capture-the-flag competition. Test your skills in web exploitation, crypto, and forensics.

title: Financial Literacy 101
description: Learn budgeting, saving, and investing basics. Free workbook included.

title: Rock Climbing Night
description: Free belay instruction and climbing for all skill levels.

title: Research Symposium Poster Session
description: Undergraduate and graduate students present their research posters.

title: International Food Festival
description: Taste dishes from around the world prepared by international student organizations.

title: AWS Cloud Workshop
description: Deploy your first app on AWS. Covers EC2, S3, and Lambda basics.

title: Movie Night: Interstellar
description: Free outdoor screening of Interstellar. Blankets and popcorn provided.

title: Women in STEM Panel
description: Hear from women leaders in engineering, CS, and data science about their career journeys.

title: Volunteer at Feeding Tampa Bay
description: Help sort and pack food for families in need. Transportation included.

title: Leetcode Study Group
description: Weekly problem-solving session. This week: dynamic programming patterns.

title: Salsa Dancing Social
description: Beginner lesson at 8pm, open social dancing at 9pm. No partner needed.

title: Pre-Med Advising Drop-In
description: Get your questions answered about MCAT prep, clinical hours, and applications.

title: Startup Pitch Night
description: Watch student teams pitch their startup ideas to a panel of investors and mentors.

title: Bob Ross Paint Night
description: Follow along to a Bob Ross tutorial. All supplies provided. Happy little trees!

title: Linux Command Line Bootcamp
description: Learn essential bash commands, file navigation, and shell scripting basics.

title: Campus 5K Fun Run
description: A casual 5K around campus. Free t-shirt for all finishers. No registration fee.

title: Origami Workshop
description: Learn to fold cranes, flowers, and more. All materials provided.

title: Therapy Dog Visit
description: Pet therapy dogs during midterms week. Sponsored by the Counseling Center.

title: Competitive Programming Practice
description: Practice ICPC-style problems. This week's focus: graph algorithms.

title: Sunset Kayaking Trip
description: Paddle along the Hillsborough River at sunset. Equipment and transport provided.

title: Ethics in AI Panel Discussion
description: Faculty panel on bias in machine learning, autonomous weapons, and AI governance.

title: Chess Tournament
description: Swiss-system tournament. All skill levels welcome. Prizes for top 3.

title: Resume Writing Workshop
description: Learn how to write a standout resume that gets past ATS systems.

title: Plant Swap & Care Tips
description: Bring a plant cutting to trade. Learn care tips from botany students.

title: Grad School Application Workshop
description: How to write a strong personal statement and secure recommendation letters.

title: Spikeball Tournament
description: 2v2 spikeball tournament. Sign up as a pair. Prizes for winning team.

title: Intro to Figma for Developers
description: Learn Figma basics: auto-layout, components, and developer handoff.

title: Trivia Night
description: Teams of up to 6. Categories include pop culture, science, and USF history.

title: Mock Interview Day
description: Practice behavioral and technical interviews with industry professionals.

title: Astronomy Observation Night
description: View Jupiter and its moons through the department telescope. Weather permitting.

title: Board Game Cafe Night
description: Play Catan, Wingspan, Ticket to Ride, and more. Snacks and drinks provided.

title: CPR & First Aid Certification
description: Get American Red Cross CPR and First Aid certified. $25 materials fee.

title: GitHub & Git Workshop
description: Learn branching, merging, pull requests, and collaborative workflows.

title: Spoken Word Poetry Slam
description: Share original work or come listen. Theme: 'What Keeps You Up at Night.'

title: Nutrition & Meal Prep on a Budget
description: Learn to plan and prep healthy meals for under $30/week.

title: Capture the Flag: Outdoor Edition
description: Giant outdoor CTF game. Teams of 10. Free t-shirts for participants.
